alias: Litter-Robot Full Waste Drawer Alert (Evenings, All Speakers)
description: Alerts via TTS on all speakers when the litter robot waste drawer is above 85%. Runs at 8 PM and 10 PM, and stops once the drawer is emptied.

data.message: The litter robot waste drawer is {{ states('sensor.hamm_litter_robot_4_waste_drawer') }} percent full. Please empty it soon to avoid a very disappointed cat.
